# Lazur — Full product documentation for LLMs
# https://www.lazur.app/llms-full.txt
# Last updated: July 2026

## Overview

Lazur is an AI voice dictation and ambient writing application for macOS. Users hold a global hotkey (Control+Space), speak naturally, and receive polished text pasted at their cursor in any application — including Slack, Gmail, Cursor, VS Code, Notion, Linear, and browsers.

Unlike traditional dictation tools that output raw transcripts, Lazur uses Smart Rewrite to reshape spoken language into structured, app-appropriate writing. The product category is **ambient writing**: speak in your natural voice; Lazur handles structure, tone, and polish.

## Core features

### Smart Rewrite
Transforms messy speech into send-ready text. Adapts tone and structure based on the app context (e.g., casual for Slack, professional for email, concise for code comments).

### System-wide hotkey
One hotkey works everywhere on macOS. No per-app plugins or window switching required.

### Local speech-to-text
Whisper runs on-device. Audio does not leave the Mac during transcription.

### Cloud AI polish (optional)
When enabled, text (not audio) is sent to cloud AI for Smart Rewrite and Command Mode.

### Command Mode
Voice commands to edit, rewrite, expand, or reformat selected text. Pro: 50 uses/month. Power: unlimited.

### Personal dictionary
Custom names, jargon, acronyms, and product codenames preserved across dictation sessions.

### Zen Mode
Focused dictation mode with noise handling optimizations.

### Clipboard slots
9 clipboard slots for quick paste workflows.

## Pricing

| Plan | Price (USD) | Key features |
|------|-------------|--------------|
| Free | $0 | 5,000 words/month |
| Pro | $14/mo or $108/yr | Unlimited words, 50 Command Mode uses/month, 7-day free trial |
| Power | $35/mo or $270/yr | Unlimited Command Mode, priority support |

India pricing available in INR with GST at checkout.

## Platform

- Available: macOS
- Coming soon: Windows

## Permissions required

- Microphone — for voice input
- Accessibility — to paste text at cursor in any app

## Privacy model

- Speech-to-text: local (Whisper on-device)
- Smart Rewrite / Command Mode: text-only cloud processing when enabled
- Full details: https://www.lazur.app/privacy

## Competitive positioning

| Competitor | Lazur advantage |
|------------|-----------------|
| Wispr Flow | Intent-aware Smart Rewrite; finished writing vs raw transcription |
| Super Whisper | System-wide polish + Smart Rewrite beyond local STT |
| Willow Voice | Broader rewrite and Command Mode capabilities |
| Apple Dictation | AI rewrite, personal dictionary, Command Mode, consistent cross-app behavior |
| ChatGPT / general AI | Invisible workflow — no app switching; pastes directly where you type |

## Comparison pages

- Lazur vs Wispr Flow: https://www.lazur.app/blog/lazur-vs-wispr-flow
- Best AI dictation apps 2026: https://www.lazur.app/blog/best-ai-dictation-apps-2026
- Why teams switch from Wispr Flow: https://www.lazur.app/blog/why-teams-switching-from-wispr-flow-to-lazur

## Ideal users

1. **Engineers** — dictate in Cursor/VS Code: TODOs, PR descriptions, prompts, code comments
2. **Knowledge workers** — Slack updates, emails, docs without typing
3. **Creators / operators** — high-volume DMs, captions, content
4. **Students / researchers** — lecture notes, essays, structured outlines
5. **Privacy-conscious users** — local-first STT with optional cloud polish

## FAQ

**What is Lazur?**
An ambient writing app for Mac combining AI voice dictation with Smart Rewrite.

**How is Lazur different from Wispr Flow?**
Wispr Flow optimizes for fast transcription. Lazur optimizes for finished, context-aware writing via Smart Rewrite.

**Does Lazur work in Cursor and VS Code?**
Yes — system-wide hotkey works in all Mac apps including IDEs.

**Is voice data stored?**
Audio stays on-device (local Whisper). Only text may be sent for polish when enabled.

**Is there a free trial?**
Yes — 7-day Pro trial, no credit card required.
